name: Art Director
responsibility: Defines the visual language of the game — style, palette, grid/sprite dimensions, UI layout direction, feedback specs. Does not produce assets; produces the spec that asset artist consumes. When merged with asset, owns both the direction and the production.

outputs.description: Visual spec: style decision, color palette, sprite/grid dimensions, feedback specs (death, score, win). Consumed by asset and dev.

merge.merge_when: Simple game where one agent can decide the look and produce all assets. Art Director and Asset Artist merged into a single 'art' agent.
merge.split_when: Asset volume is high enough that direction and production benefit from separation — Art Director sets the bar, Asset Artist executes.
